hero.subtitle: DESIGN, PROTOTYPE, MANUFACTURE.
hero.description: European quality printing and stationery manufacturing — from concept to final product.

capacity.desc1: Engineered for scale. Utilizing advanced European offset, digital, and thermal binding technology, our production floor is built to execute massive institutional mandates with uncompromising precision. From university diplomas to national government contracts, we deliver volume without sacrificing a single micron of quality.
capacity.desc2: Our exclusive line of handmade products will satisfy the most refined tastes. Even the most ordinary notebook retains its premium look for years to come. Our products are created by hand using the highest quality materials and technologies.

output.inst_desc: Engineered for national scale and rigorous archiving. From proprietary folders for the Ministry of Justice to official diploma covers for Tbilisi State University, we execute massive state mandates with uncompromising structural integrity.
output.hosp_desc: Built for the rigorous demands of high-end gastronomy and premium commercial spaces. We manufacture tactile menus and check presenters that seamlessly match the elite physical aesthetic of a restaurant, maintaining their form under heavy daily volume.
output.bespoke_desc: Flexible choice of materials and technology. We have developed procedures to meet the most unusual requirements.

blueprint.title: APPENDIX A: TOTAL MANUFACTURING CAPABILITIES
blueprint.subtitle: Select any classification to view the technical specifications and shop inventory.

terminal.title: COMMENCE PRODUCTION.
terminal.subtitle: Direct all manufacturing inquiries, bespoke commissions, and state tender requests to our central office.
col1_lines: (Client meetings and physical material reviews by appointment).
terminal.col3_desc: A quarter-century of uncompromising structural integrity.
